title: ChargePoint Holdings, Inc. (CHPT) Earnings Report - Analyst Expectations
text: ChargePoint Holdings (CHPT) Earnings Dates & Report data showing analyst expectations. Wall Street experts anticipate that ChargePoint Holdings will report a quarterly loss of $1.07 per share in its upcoming results, which marks a 10.8% increase compared to the same quarter last year. For their last quarter, ChargePoint reported earnings of negative $0.06 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of negative $0.08 per share, reflecting a positive earnings surprise of 25.00%. The analyst consensus suggests a neutral outlook for the stock with expectations of continued losses in the near term. The 9 analysts that cover ChargePoint Holdings stock have a consensus rating of Hold and an average price target of $9.67, which forecasts a 41.17% increase in the stock price over the next year.
